title: Registries
subtitle: Browse and install skills and plugins from third-party registries

empty.title: No registries configured
empty.description: Add a registry from GitHub, GitLab, or an HTTPS URL to browse third-party skills and plugins.

detail.author: Author
detail.selectPrompt: Select an item to view details

settings.title: Registry settings
settings.subtitle: Manage the third-party registries that supply skills and plugins.
settings.noneDescription: Add your first registry to start browsing skills and plugins.
settings.warningBody: Registry adapters are executable TypeScript — only install them from sources you trust.

actions.deleteConfirm: Remove registry "{{slug}}"? This deletes its row and any cached files.

addDialog.title: Add registry
addDialog.description: Fetch an adapter from a Git repository or HTTPS URL. The file is downloaded and validated before it is enabled.

fields.slugHint: URL-safe identifier; auto-derived from the source if left blank.

preview.title: Adapter source
preview.emptyHint: Press Preview to fetch the adapter file and inspect it before installing.

addDialog.trust: I have reviewed the adapter source and trust this code.

errors.previewBeforeAdd: Preview the adapter source and confirm trust before adding.
